text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kyoto—it's the end of April and fresh, green
leaves are swaying on the cherry trees...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto, you still there? ...Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! I'm keeping up!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It was so kind of you to keep checking on me
along the way.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Because of that, I didn't get on the wrong train or
get lost while coming here!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
We came here together. It's only normal that I at
least ask if you're okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega, Meisho Doto, and I have come to
Kyoto Racecourse to see a race today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Or to borrow someone else's words, we came here
to see an "opera."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We have personal invitations from the opera's
star herself.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: A star, huh.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But with the best of our generation here to vie for
a shield plaque...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I guess it isn't really an overstatement.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I almost feel relieved.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Raise your glasses. Pour out your blessings. Let
your joy and amazement overflow.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Sing, you birds! Shine, you sun! And you, earth,
let your flora sprout from the ground!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: A new chapter begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Are we really supposed to be cheering for
that?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Don't ask me! I don't know either, but...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
It's like I... It's like I... argh—I haven't the slightest
clue!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hums in high spirits, and everyone can't help
but feel like she's got some trick up her sleeve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's comically lighthearted, but remarkably
unwavering. Then, on the track...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We're onto the homestretch! Narita Top Road's
barely holding the lead!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's T.M. Opera O! T.M. Opera O is closing the
gap! She takes the lead!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: N-nooooo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's T.M. Opera O! She's going for it! Can Narita
Top Road make a comeback?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Second place pushes forward from the outside!
But T.M. Opera O is keeping her place! T.M.
Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Gah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: She's done it! T.M. Opera O comes in first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O... O... Opera O... Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (How did she run like that?!)

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! I hope you enjoyed the opening
act!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: For you see...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A solo won't be enough, a duo is too few, and a
trio just won't suffice.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do you understand? No, you already knew, didn't you? I'm talking to you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It's you I've been waiting for. You and you alone...
are the fourth actor in this epic!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Meisho Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uh... me...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Me... me... me...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back, Meisho Doto remains quiet,
preoccupied with her thoughts. Not once does
she get lost or make a mistake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After we get back to the academy...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you again for today! And... um... well...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I'll excuse myself here!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Haaah...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm... Opera O's...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
She's still wearing her uniform... Guess that's just
her being forgetful.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Hey.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll get changed first, obviously, but...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Is it okay if I run for a bit?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like the moment a water droplet hits a surface,
Admire Vega's eyes grow wide as she watches
Meisho Doto running in her uniform.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She can't look away—her gaze is unwavering.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's filled with the sudden urge to dash off
running.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Admire Vega heads off, giving in to her impulses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her tail sways in the sunlight, its orange hue
highlighting her silhouette.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In this moment, everything about her is beautiful,
vivid, and vibrant.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Opera O can really run.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile... I placed third.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
No! This won't do at all!
...All right.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I can do this! I can get way better than I am now!
